allow: PowerShell($tools = @\('python','python3','node','npx','magick','convert','gswin64c','gswin32c'\); foreach\($t in $tools\){$c=Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){"$t -> $\($c.Source\)"}}; "--- check pip pymupdf/pdf2image ---"; if\(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\){python -c "import fitz; print\('pymupdf OK'\)" 2>&1; python -c "import pdfplumber; print\('pdfplumber OK'\)" 2>&1})

PowerShell($scratch = "$env:TEMP\\pdfrender"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $scratch | Out-Null; Set-Location $scratch; npm init -y | Out-Null; "Installing pdf-to-png-converter..."; npm install pdf-to-png-converter@3.6.0 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(Set-Location "$env:TEMP\\pdfrender"; npm install pdf-to-png-converter@latest 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; "--- version ---"; \(Get-Content node_modules\\pdf-to-png-converter\\package.json | ConvertFrom-Json\).version)

PowerShell(Set-Location "$env:TEMP\\pdfrender"; Get-ChildItem node_modules -Directory | Where-Object {$_.Name -match 'canvas|sharp|png|jpeg'} | Select-Object Name; "--- napi canvas? ---"; Test-Path "node_modules\\@napi-rs\\canvas")

PowerShell($scratch = "$env:TEMP\\bfly"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $scratch | Out-Null; Set-Location $scratch; npm init -y | Out-Null; npm install pdfjs-dist@4.7.76 @napi-rs/canvas 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell($scratch = "$env:TEMP\\bcur"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $scratch | Out-Null; Set-Location $scratch; npm init -y | Out-Null; npm install @napi-rs/canvas 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2)

PowerShell($scratch = "$env:TEMP\\bfly2"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $scratch | Out-Null; Set-Location $scratch; npm init -y | Out-Null; npm install @napi-rs/canvas 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2)
